summary: P3 Phase Testing Complete. All 242 pytest tests pass. Backend incident panel APIs working (summary, list, action). Frontend Operator Incident Panel fully functional with summary cards, filters, incident list, and action buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: All 242 pytest tests pass: 50 delta-debounce + 63 provider simulation + 129 P2 tests
Backend incident APIs at /api/ops/incidents/* correctly use tenant isolation
Incident list enriched with recommended_action, can_auto_heal, gold_source, issue_type fields
Frontend handles both severity formats (critical/high/medium/low AND P1/P2/P3/P4)
Frontend filters work correctly with API query parameters
seed_data_creation: None - tests work with existing 56 incidents in reconciliation_cases collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: P3 Phase complete. 242 unit tests pass (P1 core lockdown 48 + P2 replay/duplicate/ARI 81 + P3 delta-debounce/provider-simulation 113). Operator Incident Panel at /incidents route shows summary cards (Total: 56, Open: 44, Critical: 0, Resolved: 9), filters by status/severity/provider, incident list with expand/collapse, and action buttons (Resolve/Suppress) on open incidents. Backend APIs at /api/ops/incidents/* require Bearer token auth.

Incident Panel API Endpoints (3 endpoint.GET /api/ops/incidents/summary: PASS - returns total_incidents:56, by_status, by_severity, by_type, ari_dead_letters:0, open_count:44, resolved_count:9
Incident Panel API Endpoints (3 endpoint.GET /api/ops/incidents/list: PASS - returns paginated incidents with enrichment (recommended_action, can_auto_heal, gold_source, issue_type)
Incident Panel API Endpoints (3 endpoint.POST /api/ops/incidents/action/{id}: PASS - accepts retry/review/resolve/suppress actions, creates audit trail

Frontend Operator Incident Panel.Title: PASS - 'Operator Incident Panel' with subtitle 'Reconciliation, drift ve hard fail yonetimi'
Frontend Operator Incident Panel.Summary Cards: PASS - 4 cards: Toplam(56), Acik(44), Kritik(0), Cozulmus(9)
Frontend Operator Incident Panel.Issue Type Breakdown: PASS - Shows cancellation_without_reservation:2, ghost_reservation:22, missing_mapping:18, rate_mismatch:1, amount_mismatch:1
Frontend Operator Incident Panel.Filters: PASS - 3 dropdown filters: Tum Durumlar, Tum Oncelikler, Tum Provider'lar
Frontend Operator Incident Panel.Incident List: PASS - Shows 56 incidents with severity badges and status badges
Frontend Operator Incident Panel.Action Buttons: PASS - Resolve and Suppress buttons appear on open incidents

mocked_api_note: NO MOCKED APIs - All tests hit real backend via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL
